re_viewer0.24.0-alpha.1+dev

ArrowPrimitiveType

Required Associated Constants

  • DATA_TYPE

Required Associated Types

  • Native

Provided Methods

  • default_value
  • get_byte_width

Dyn Compatibility

Implementors

In re_viewer::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::array

re_viewer::external::re_chunk::external::arrow::array

Trait ArrowPrimitiveType

pub trait ArrowPrimitiveType: PrimitiveTypeSealed + 'static {
    type Native: ArrowNativeTypeOp;

    const DATA_TYPE: DataType;

    // Provided methods
    fn get_byte_width() -> usize { ... }
    fn default_value() -> Self::Native { ... }
}
Expand description

Trait for primitive values.

This trait bridges the dynamic-typed nature of Arrow (via DataType) with the static-typed nature of rust types (ArrowNativeType) for all types that implement ArrowNativeType.

Required Associated Constantsยง

const DATA_TYPE: DataType

the corresponding Arrow data type of this primitive type.

Required Associated Typesยง

type Native: ArrowNativeTypeOp

Corresponding Rust native type for the primitive type.

Provided Methodsยง

fn get_byte_width() -> usize

๐Deprecated since 52.0.0: Use ArrowNativeType::get_byte_width

Returns the byte width of this primitive type.

fn default_value() -> Self::Native

Returns a default value of this primitive type.

This is useful for aggregate array ops like sum(), mean().

Dyn Compatibilityยง

This trait is not dyn compatible.

In older versions of Rust, dyn compatibility was called "object safety", so this trait is not object safe.

Implementorsยง

ยง

impl ArrowPrimitiveType for Date32Type

ยง

const DATA_TYPE: DataType = DataType::Date32

ยง

type Native = i32

ยง

const DATA_TYPE: DataType = DataType::Date64

ยง

type Native = i64
